trades.reasoning: LITE is entirely absent from the screener, signaling no momentum; selling to redeploy its capital into a top-ranked candidate and free up a meaningful cash position.
Score 95 with RSI in the bullish momentum zone, MACD crossover, histogram rising, and price above SMA-20 — all four signals firing, strongest outside current holdings.

decisions.briefing: Markets were dead flat today (NASDAQ and S&P 500 both at 0.0%), giving a calm window to clean up the portfolio. LITE has no screener presence at all, so I'm rotating that single share into AAOI which carries a perfect 95 score with every momentum signal confirmed. EAT and ETSY remain top-ranked at 95 and are holding near cost, so no action needed there.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities closed essentially unchanged on April 30, with neither the NASDAQ nor the S&P 500 recording a meaningful move. The flat session reflects end-of-month positioning caution as institutional investors rebalance portfolios ahead of May, a month historically associated with the 'Sell in May' seasonal pattern. Without a fresh macro catalyst — no Fed speakers or major earnings surprises — traders largely stood pat.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股於4月30日幾乎平盤收市，那斯達克與標普500指數均未出現明顯波動。此種橫盤走勢反映出機構投資者在月末進行投資組合再平衡時的審慎態度，加上5月份歷來與「五月賣股離場」的季節性規律相關，市場觀望情緒升溫。在缺乏聯準會官員發言或重大財報意外等新催化劑的情況下，投資者大多按兵不動。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Portfolio rotation means deliberately selling positions that have lost momentum or never had it, and redeploying that capital into stocks where momentum is strongest right now. It prevents your portfolio from getting 'stuck' holding yesterday's trades while better opportunities sit on the sideline. Today's move — out of LITE (zero screener signals) and into AAOI (score 95, all signals confirmed) — is a textbook example.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「投資組合輪動」是指主動賣出動能減弱或本身就缺乏動能的持倉，將資金重新配置到當前動能最強的股票上。這種策略能防止投資組合「卡住」，避免繼續抱著過時的部位，而讓更好的機會空手而過。今日操作——賣出LITE（選股系統零訊號）、買入AAOI（評分95分、所有技術訊號確認）——正是輪動策略的典型示範。
